notes: Canonical PHPM SAQ taxonomy for migration. Runtime is unchanged; legacy fields remain in active use until a compatibility normalizer is introduced.

official_written_classifications.label: Population Health
official_written_classifications.description: Written exam content area focused on population health concepts, methods, and applications.
official_written_classifications.notes: Official written classification. Use for question-part scoring alignment.

official_written_classifications.label: Health Systems
official_written_classifications.description: Written exam content area focused on health system organization, policy, performance, and stewardship.

official_written_classifications.label: Basic Sciences of Public Health and Preventive Medicine
official_written_classifications.description: Written exam content area focused on foundational scientific principles supporting PHPM practice.

official_written_classifications.label: Intervention and Methods in Health Promotion and Disease Prevention
official_written_classifications.description: Written exam content area focused on promotion/prevention interventions, implementation, and evaluation methods.

official_written_classifications.label: Intervention and Methods in Health Protection
official_written_classifications.description: Written exam content area focused on health protection interventions, controls, and applied methods.

official_written_classifications.label: Management and Program Planning
official_written_classifications.description: Written exam content area focused on management, leadership, and program planning in PHPM contexts.

official_topic_themes.label: Communicable Diseases
official_topic_themes.description: Official topic theme covering communicable disease epidemiology, prevention, control, and response.

official_topic_themes.label: Non-Communicable Diseases
official_topic_themes.description: Official topic theme covering chronic disease burden, determinants, prevention, and management strategies.

official_topic_themes.label: Mental Health and Substance Use
official_topic_themes.description: Official topic theme covering mental health and substance-use epidemiology, programs, and interventions.

official_topic_themes.label: Environmental Health
official_topic_themes.description: Official topic theme covering environmental hazards, exposure pathways, and control measures.

official_topic_themes.label: Maternal and Child Health
official_topic_themes.description: Official topic theme covering maternal, neonatal, child, and family health priorities.

official_topic_themes.label: Injury: Voluntary and Involuntary
official_topic_themes.description: Official topic theme covering intentional and unintentional injury prevention and control.

official_topic_themes.label: Other
official_topic_themes.description: Simulator extension theme for official-sample or legacy content that does not cleanly fit themes A–F. Use only at the theme layer.
official_topic_themes.notes: Constitution-locked extension. Not a written-classification code.

simulator_tags.label: Communicable Diseases
simulator_tags.description: Normalized simulator tag for targeted practice filtering and cross-schema indexing.
simulator_tags.notes: Minimum required selectable filter for future 15-minute and 30-minute targeted blocks.

label_tiers.primary: Required. First primary written classification code is the default blueprint counting code.
label_tiers.secondary: Optional supporting labels for legitimate overlap.

counting_rule.override_policy: Only changed by explicit future policy update.
